utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each is fully specified with relevant details and costs: health_coverage includes provider, coverage description, monthly cost, and activation date; property_coverage includes provider, coverage, monthly cost, and activation date; travel_coverage includes provider, coverage, monthly cost, and activation date; additional_services includes specific enhancements with costs; total_budget includes monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all required items are included and fully specified.
